arts.ttl: Former Atletico Madrid and Barcelona star Joao Felix set for 4th move in 3 years
arts.sum: Former Atletico Madrid and Barcelona playmaker Joao Felix looks set for another move, having left Spanish football last summer. The Portuguese star has struggled for minutes at Chelsea, and now looks to be on his way to Serie A for his first taste of Spanish football. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs West Ham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host West Ham United on Monday night knowing a win would propel them into the top four. The Blues fell to a 3-1 defeat at Manchester City last weekend and have had nine days to reflect on the result. arts.ttl: Chelsea target Deadline Day swoop for THREE midfielders
arts.sum: Chelsea have identified three midfield targets for a potential late Deadline Day swoop, according to Fabrizio Romano. Chelsea target Deadline Day swoop for THREE midfielders

arts.ttl: Analysis: How Potter will set up West Ham for his return to Chelsea
arts.sum: Injuries have played their part in Potter's decision-making, but it was still bold of the new head coach to start with a back three that contained just one natural central defender at Villa Park. The new Hammers head coach will need time for all his ideas to become embedded within a squad that was asked to play a very different brand of football under Julen Lopetegui and before that, David Moyes .
